content: Hello! Welcome to Tasklet support. How can I help you?
I got an unexpected charge on my card this morning.
I'm sorry about that. Can I get your account email address?
And can you tell me the charge amount and approximate date?
I can see that charge. It appears to be your annual plan renewal. That charge is correct based on your subscription.
Oh, I didn't realize it was annual. Okay.
Yes, your plan renews annually. The charge is legitimate.
